reviews.comment:
Mucha demora. Dejas el auto para q te lo arreglen. Te lo devuelven y ni siquiera puedes hablar con el mecanico xq no lo viste nunca. Está bueno charlar con el mecánico, le sacas dudas al q no sabe nada de mecánica, o hasta le brindas algun consejo. Por eso uno termina llendo a otro... y renegando xq estas pagando socio y seguro.

(Translated by Google)
The wait is terrible. You leave your car to be fixed. They give it back to you, and you can't even talk to the mechanic because you've never even seen him. It's good to chat with the mechanic; you can answer questions if you don't know anything about cars, or even offer some advice. That's why you end up going somewhere else... and complaining because you're paying for membership and insurance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bk42ZTdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lentos para atender, se produce cola para cargar nafta, cuando no debería pasar, ya que  no utilizan todas las bocas de expendio, no lo recomiendo si uno está apurado

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service, there's a queue to fill up with gas, which shouldn't happen since they don't use all the pumps. I don't recommend it if you're in a hurry.

reviews.comment:
Un buen complejo compuesto por una estación de servicios con expendio de combustibles - que en este momento está siendo modernizada - y en la parte superior un taller completo para el automóvil.

(Translated by Google)
A good complex consisting of a service station with fuel sales - which is currently being modernized - and on the top floor a complete car workshop.
